title: Manual source end-to-end pipeline proof (synthnote)
problem: Tickets 088–091 proved each manual spine step in isolation. Next smallest proof is one integration test running ingest → extract-claims → link-concepts → build-relationships → detect-contradictions on synthnote with checksum fixture map and no explicit --fixture flags.
acceptance_criteria: Single unit test runs full manual synthnote spine through detect-contradictions with mock LLM only.
No golden test changes; existing manual unit tests remain green.
non_goals: No live Ollama, OpenAI/cloud, export, schema migration, or score reconciliation changes.
rollback_plan: Delete the e2e unit test file.
